name: Chocolate Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a quart jar.
2. Allow the liqueur to mature for 2 weeks, stirring occasionally as the chocolate may settle on the bottom.
3. The finished version will be thin but tasty and excellent for mixing into coffee or pouring over desserts.
4. If desired, add glycerin to thicken the mixture.
5. For a chocolate mint variation, add 1/2 teaspoon of fresh mint and a few drops of peppermint extract. Allow it to mature for an additional 2 weeks before serving.
